summary: Markets show mixed sentiment on April 24, 2026, with crypto pausing after recent gains and gold maintaining strength near highs amid technical supply zones. Forex pairs exhibit neutral-to-bearish biases, while commodities like Brent lean bearish under pressure. Overall volatility persists due to geopolitical risks and upcoming economic data.
